candidate.name: Howard Crawford
candidate.notes: Tag. Multiplayer tag. This is really well done. Always sending websocket message though even when not moving.

candidate.name: Brandon Lantz
candidate.notes: neighborhood. Tag the map for meetups and commenting. Pretty simple but fun.

candidate.name: Broderick Johnson
candidate.notes: OfficeTalk. Multiple players in a voice chat and moving avatar around.

candidate.name: Benjamin DeGraff
candidate.notes: Vibe Check. Shared jukebox. chat. pulls songs from youtube. websocket seems to be working. I really like this.

candidate.name: James Davies
candidate.notes: Sodacap. Very clever. Twist on lemonade stand. tons of websocket messages flying by. updates leaderboard

candidate.name: Tyler Wilcock
candidate.notes: Cracked typer. Petty cool typing testing and leaderboard.

candidate.name: Jackson Passey
candidate.notes: Bracket Builder. Really well done bracket builder.

candidate.name: Aaron Wood
candidate.notes: The quisling. Need 5 players to play

candidate.name: Kaden Bradshaw
candidate.notes: PantryPal. Nice friend request with websocket. create recipe and shopping list with AI. share recipes. This is pretty cool
